page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 64 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. With a 1:1 ratio of physical cores to vCPUs and single-threaded cores, the instance provides dedicated compute resources without hyper-threading.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 30 Gbps, facilitating data transfer for distributed workloads.

The absence of integrated GPUs and local storage represents a clear architectural tradeoff, positioning this instance away from hardware-accelerated graphics or high-IOPS local database workloads. However, the dedicated core allocation and high network throughput offer predictable compute performance. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the resource density of 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores paired with 256 GB of RAM makes it a stable platform for enterprise applications that require consistent CPU performance without the overhead of shared-core environments.

This hardware profile is designed for enterprise-grade general-purpose workloads. Suitable applications include web serving, application servers, containerized microservices, and distributed systems that rely on network-attached storage and require high network bandwidth.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at 2.5 GHz. It provides 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps. The dedicated, single-threaded core configuration ensures predictable compute performance without hyper-threading overhead. This resource profile is suited for enterprise application servers, web serving, containerized deployments, and distributed systems requiring stable CPU allocation and high network throughput.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 30 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for stable enterprise workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 64-core compute platform with balanced memory and high network bandwidth for predictable enterprise application hosting.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8163 cores running at 2.5 GHz.
256.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core.
30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer.
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the hardware profile.
KVM hypervisor virtualization with single-threaded core execution.
Suited for enterprise application servers, web serving, and containerized workloads.
